chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4253 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing on Misc. No.18762/2024 3. For hearing of main case 07-02-2025 Mr. Abdul Moiz Jafferi Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel states that provisional release has already been ordered herein, however, it may be just and proper that this petition to be disposed of and the fate of the amount security be subject to outcome of related SCRA being SCRA No. 1756 of 2023. Learned Assistant Attorney General articulated no cavil to the aforesaid. Petition is disposed of in aforesaid terms along with listed application. Judge Judge Amjad PS
